approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded empirical pilot sample candidate SHA-256 a77ec8eef9266319dcdca874ea74f58a427961121731a24736d9165bb57cee8e as committed in 9538cc6d31d8b00ec31baa55592b9012b026ba68. I approve requests 11872 and 35076 as the complete membership of a local-only, purposive two-case agent empirical pilot and approve expansion of their existing purpose restrictions solely to bounded local agent empirical analysis under the approved v0.2 protocol. This approval supports only case-level feasibility findings for those two requests and does not authorize population inference, archive-wide claims, context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical-result approval, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates. Execution requires a separately committed exact authorization and successful pre-execution verification.
